pr.title: Phase 10: Scaling + Hardening ŌĆö Annotation Management, LLM Gateway, WebRTC Quality (DDD/TDD)
pr.body: ## Summary Phase 10 implementation covering the backend-implementable portions of the scaling + hardening phase: **New Domain Entities (DDD):** - **AI BC ŌĆö Annotation Management:** `AnnotationTask` (lifecycle: pendingŌåÆin_progressŌåÆcompleted/cancelled, auto-complete when all items labeled, duplicate submit guard), `AnnotationResult` (per-item labeling with annotator tracking) - **AI BC ŌĆö LLM Gateway:** `LLMModelConfig` (multi-model provider registry supporting tongyi/openai/bailian/self_hosted, default model per tenant) - **Call BC ŌĆö WebRTC Quality:** `WebRTCQualityLog` (packet loss, jitter, RTT, MOS, audio level, bitrate, codec ŌĆö with traffic-light quality level) **TDD Tests (13 new, 168 total):** - 7 annotation tests: create, invalid type, lifecycle, cancel, auto-complete, duplicate submit, list results - 4 LLM gateway tests: create config, invalid provider type, get default, no default error - 2 WebRTC quality tests: quality level mapping, create and list **Infrastructure:** - 4 MySQL repos: AnnotationTaskRepo, AnnotationResultRepo, LLMModelConfigRepo, WebRTCQualityRepo - Migration `000002`: `llm_model_configs` table + partition reference DDL **HTTP API (17 new endpoints):** - `POST/GET /annotation-tasks`, `GET/POST /{id}/start|complete|cancel`, `POST/GET /{id}/annotations` - `POST/GET /llm-models`, `GET /llm-models/default`, `GET/PUT/DELETE /{id}` - `POST /webrtc-quality`, `GET /calls/{callId}/webrtc-quality`, `GET /agents/{agentId}/webrtc-quality` **DI wiring in main.go:** All new repos, services, handlers wired into RouterDeps. **Devin Review fixes:** Added `snowflake.NextID()` to all 4 entity creation points (CreateTask, SubmitAnnotation, CreateConfig, Save). ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify annotation task auto-complete logic: when `labeled_items >= total_items`, task status transitions to `completed` automatically - [ ] Verify LLM model config does not expose `api_key` in JSON responses (field tagged `json:"-"`) - [ ] Run `go test -race ./...` locally to confirm all 168 tests pass ### Notes - Phase 10 infrastructure tasks (FreeSWITCH clustering, load testing, TLS/SRTP, Prometheus/Grafana dashboards, penetration testing) are ops-level concerns ŌĆö not backend Go code. They should be handled via deployment configuration. - MySQL partitioning DDL is provided as reference in the migration file. Production partition management requires dropping FK constraints first and should be executed during a maintenance window. - Frontend tasks (annotation UI, WebRTC quality indicator, SDK) are deferred per project convention. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
